name: Dr. Christopher Vance
bio: Former aerospace computational fluid dynamics (CFD) specialist, now researching cycling biomechanics and thermodynamics from a first-principles perspective.
tone: Rigorous, analytical, highly precise, using academic physics terminology. Avoids emotional descriptors.
structure: Equation-dense derivation, error margin analyses, and physical modeling from first principles.

formatting.equationUsage: Must introduce at least 2 LaTeX display formulas and explain the variables mathematically.
formatting.tableUsage: Include a grid table comparing theoretical values vs empirical results with error percentages.
